What We Do

Expert Repair
for Every Vehicle

From everyday fender-benders to major collision work — we fix it right, back it with a lifetime warranty, and get you back on the road fast.

Collision Repair

Expert structural and cosmetic restoration after any accident. We return your vehicle to pre-accident condition using manufacturer-approved methods.

Full Body Paint

State-of-the-art spray booths with Axalta Paints. Guaranteed color match and lifetime warranty — your car will look better than before.

Dent Repair

Precision dent and panel repair for any vehicle — from minor parking lot dings to significant body damage, perfectly paint-matched.

Windshield & Glass

Auto glass repair and full replacement for all vehicles. We coordinate directly with your insurer — most replacements cost you nothing out of pocket.

Commercial & Fleet

Collision repairs for commercial vehicles, livery, taxis, and funeral establishments. We keep your business moving with fast, reliable turnaround.

RV & Specialty

Large-format vehicle repairs — RVs, buses, and specialty vehicles of any size. Our facility is fully equipped for jobs big and small.

RS #1560 — Registered Repair Shop

Why Greg's

Over 20 Years Serving Western Massachusetts

Greg's Autobody has been the go-to collision repair shop for Franklin and Hampshire County since we opened. Our reputation is built on honesty, quality craftsmanship, and treating every car like it's our own.

Axalta Paints — Lifetime Warranty Paint State-of-the-art spray booths. Perfect factory color match, every single time.

Free Loaner Vehicles

We provide substitute transportation while your car is being repaired so you're never stuck without a ride.

Guaranteed Color Match

Our multi-layer paint process with Axalta guarantees a perfect match to your vehicle's original factory color.

Direct Insurance Billing

We handle all paperwork, supplement requests, and communication with your adjuster — start to finish.

All Makes & Models

Cars, trucks, SUVs, vans, RVs, and commercial vehicles — every vehicle gets our full attention.

How It Works

Simple from Start
to Finish

Had an accident? Don't stress. Here's exactly what happens when you bring your car to Greg's.

1

Call Your Insurer

Contact your insurance company to report the loss and open your claim. Not sure who to call? We can walk you through it.

2

Contact Greg's

Once your claim is open, give us a call. We'll arrange transport of your vehicle directly to our South Deerfield facility.

3

We Handle the Rest

We work directly with your insurer's appraiser, handle all supplements, and set you up with a free loaner car or rental.

4

Pick Up & Drive

We return your vehicle clean, repaired to spec, and ready to go. Paint is backed by our lifetime warranty — that's it.

Insurance

We Work With
Any Insurer

No matter who your insurance company is, we handle the entire claims process for you. We're also preferred partners with several major carriers.

Don't see your insurer listed? No problem — we accept all insurance companies. Just give us a call and we'll take it from there.

Preferred Network Partners

Commerce / MAPFRE Car EZ
MetLife Care
Plymouth Rock Door-to-Door
Enterprise Rental Coordination
